title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.860 - If prisoner bailed, no special term
text:
545.860.  If prisoner bailed, no special term. — If the prisoner shall be bailed or discharged, the jailer shall give the judge notice of the fact, who shall thereupon be exempted from the duty of holding a special term of his court.
(RSMo 1939 § 2021) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1857; 1919 § 2353; 1909 § 3875
